page_metadata.biotools__summary: COLOCdb represents the most comprehensive colocalization analysis by integrating publicly available GWASs, 187 multi-omics datasets from 13 types of xQTL and three different colocalization algorithms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: COLOCdb represents the most comprehensive colocalization analysis by integrating publicly available GWASs, 187 multi-omics datasets from 13 types of xQTL and three different colocalization algorithms.
